title: Finite DAG Topological Order Certificates

solver_reuse.target: finite DAG topological-order replay and theorem boundary
solver_reuse.pressure: Replay checks two valid topological orders, one malformed order rejected by an edge-position violation, and one cyclic graph rejected by a directed-cycle obstruction; no source CNF/SMT artifact is committed yet, so this is not a solver regression or benchmark claim.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a source Boolean/LIA artifact and checked proof route for acyclicity, topological-order existence, or cycle obstruction; keep Kahn/DFS algorithm correctness and linear-extension theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite directed graphs and topological orders by checking every vertex appears exactly once.
Check every directed edge against the listed order position.
Reject malformed rows by naming a concrete edge whose order is violated.
Reject cyclic ordering claims by replaying a directed cycle witness.
Add a source Boolean/LIA artifact and checked certificate route before promoting the pack as a solver regression.
Keep general topological-sort algorithm correctness, linear-extension existence, and asymptotic complexity as Lean/theorem horizons until proof artifacts exist.
